description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring both gable and hip elements. The front facade is adorned with a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and decorative trim. Multiple window styles are present, including bay windows, circular windows, and symmetrical rows of rectangular windows, giving the house a stately and traditional appearance. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with a fenced-in swimming pool, ideal for recreation and gatherings. Mature trees and landscaping surround the property, enhancing its suburban charm. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Victorian architectural influences, with brick as the dominant exterior material.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a covered front porch, varied window styles, and a backyard patio with a swimming pool. The design blends Colonial and Victorian elements, surrounded by mature landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular window, bay window, and the start of the backyard patio and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, fenced swimming pool, and back entrance to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, secondary entry points, and the continuation of the roofline details.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay and circular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and decorative trim
